revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Princess Kasuga no Yamada]][[fa:شاهدخت کاسوگا نو یامادا]][[ja:春日山田皇女]][[th:เจ้าหญิงคาซูงะ โนะ ยามาดะ]][[zh:春日山田皇女]] {{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|春日山田皇女|date=January 2023}} {{Infobox royalty |consort = yes |name = Kasuga no Yamada |image = NAJDA-158-0155 全像本朝古今列女伝1 (山田皇后).jpg |succession = [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]] |reign = 534–536 |spouse = [[Emperor Ankan]] |issue = |royal house = [[:en:Imperial House of Japan|Imperial House of Japan]] |father = [[:en:Emperor Ninken|Emperor Ninken]] |mother = |birth_date = |birth_place = |death_date = |death_place = |date of burial = |place of burial = |}}
'''Princess Kasuga no Yamada''' (? – d. 539) was [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]] as the consort of [[Emperor Ankan]].<ref>Anston, W. G. (1896). ''Transactions and Proceedings of the Japan Society, London. Supplement I. Nihongi: Chronicles of Japan from the Earliest Times to A.D. 697''. Vol. 1. London: Kegan Paul, Trench, Trübner, & Co.</ref>
She was the daughter of [[:en:Emperor Ninken|Emperor Ninken]] and was married in 513.
==Notes== {{reflist}}
{{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[:en:Princess Tashiraka|Princess Tashiraka]] | title=[[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress consort of Japan]] | after=[[Princess Tachibana no Nakatsu]] | years=534–536}} {{s-end}}
{{Consorts of Japan}}
{{draft categories| [[Category:Japanese empresses consort]] [[Category:6th-century Japanese women]] [[Category:6th-century Japanese people]] [[Category:Daughters of Japanese emperors]] [[Category:539 deaths]]
[[Category:Completion tier 1]]
}}

'''Princess Kasuga no Yamada''' (? – d. 539) was [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]] as the consort of [[Emperor Ankan]].<ref>Anston, W. G. (1896). ''Transactions and Proceedings of the Japan Society, London. Supplement I. Nihongi: Chronicles of Japan from the Earliest Times to A.D. 697''. Vol. 1. London: Kegan Paul, Trench, Trübner, & Co.</ref>
She was the daughter of [[:en:Emperor Ninken|Emperor Ninken]] and was married in 513.

'''Princess Kasuga no Yamada''' (? – d. 539) was {{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038|lt=Empress of Japan|1=Empress of Japan}} as the consort of [[Emperor Ankan]].<ref>Anston, W. G. (1896). ''Transactions and Proceedings of the Japan Society, London. Supplement I. Nihongi: Chronicles of Japan from the Earliest Times to A.D. 697''. Vol. 1. London: Kegan Paul, Trench, Trübner, & Co.</ref>

She was the daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninken|en|Emperor Ninken|WD=Q357266|lt=Emperor Ninken|1=Emperor Ninken}} and was married in 513.
